philosophy.principle: All decorative and structural elements derive from three primitives: circle, square, triangle. No arbitrary curves or organic shapes.
No gradients, no soft glows, no subtle effects. Everything is direct, declarative, and visible.
The interface is built like a Bauhaus poster — bold color blocks, thick borders, asymmetric balance, overlapping geometric shapes.
InReady's identity (#FFC400 yellow, community warmth) is preserved and elevated through Bauhaus geometric discipline.
1-2 developers must be able to maintain the entire system. Tokens are centralized, components are composable, naming is clear.

colors.color: InReady brand yellow. Used for: hero accents, CTA backgrounds, highlight sections, active states, badges.
Bauhaus red. Used for: secondary CTAs, error states, emphasis sections, destructive actions.
Bauhaus blue. Used for: links, info sections, secondary backgrounds, trust indicators.
Near-black. All primary text, borders, and structural lines.
Warm off-white canvas. Slightly warm to complement #FFC400.
Pure white for cards, inputs, elevated surfaces.
From original InReady palette. Muted text, placeholders, disabled states, metadata.
Light warm grey. Dividers, subtle backgrounds, hover states.
30% opacity yellow for subtle highlight backgrounds.
Darker yellow for hover states on yellow buttons, secondary yellow accents.
Muted dark yellow for disabled yellow elements.
Green for success states, confirmations, check marks.
Same as primary-red. Error messages, form validation.
Same as primary-blue. Info messages, tooltips.

font-families.font: Geometric sans-serif. Circular letterforms embody Bauhaus principles. Used for: all headlines (h1-h4), navigation, buttons, labels, badges.
Friendly geometric sans. Maintains InReady brand warmth. Used for: body text, paragraphs, form inputs, descriptions.

container.note: From InReady grid: 1224px content on 1920 viewport

layout.section-dividers: Every major section separated by border-b-4 border-[#121212]. Creates strong horizontal rhythm (Bauhaus grid discipline).

radius.note: Bauhaus binary: sharp OR full circle. No in-between.

shadows.note: Hard offset shadows only. No blur. Bauhaus layering.

animation.interaction: On active: translate down-right and remove shadow. Simulates physical mechanical button press. Tailwind: active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] active:shadow-none
On hover: slight lift upward. Tailwind: hover:-translate-y-1
On hover: color shift to primary-yellow. Tailwind: hover:text-[#FFC400]
Chevron rotates 180deg. Content reveals via max-height transition.
Decorative shapes scale up on group hover. Tailwind: group-hover:scale-110

geometric-containers.note: Bauhaus: icons inside bordered geometric shapes

container.class: w-12 h-12 border-2 border-[#121212] flex items-center justify-center
w-12 h-12 rounded-full border-2 border-[#121212] flex items-center justify-center
w-12 h-12 border-2 border-[#121212] rotate-45 flex items-center justify-center

component.name: button
component.base-style: font: Outfit, font-bold, uppercase, tracking-wider padding: 1x font-size vertical, 1.5x font-size horizontal border: 2px solid #121212 transition: all 200ms ease-out cursor: pointer Tailwind base: font-[Outfit] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border-2 border-[#121212] transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer
component.variant: bg: #FFC400, text: #121212 shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #121212 hover: bg-[#CC8700] active: translate-x-[2px] translate-y-[2px] shadow-none Tailwind: bg-[#FFC400] text-[#121212] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#121212] hover:bg-[#CC8700] active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] active:shadow-none

bg: #121212, text: #FFFFFF shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #FFC400 hover: bg-[#2a2a2a] active: translate-x-[2px] translate-y-[2px] shadow-none Tailwind: bg-[#121212] text-white shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#FFC400] hover:bg-[#2a2a2a] active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] active:shadow-none

bg: #D02020, text: #FFFFFF shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #121212 hover: bg-[#b01a1a] Tailwind: bg-[#D02020] text-white shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#121212] hover:bg-[#b01a1a] active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] active:shadow-none

bg: #1040C0, text: #FFFFFF shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #121212 hover: bg-[#0c3399] Tailwind: bg-[#1040C0] text-white shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#121212] hover:bg-[#0c3399] active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] active:shadow-none

bg: #FFFFFF, text: #121212 border: 2px solid #121212 shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #121212 hover: bg-[#F5F5F0] Tailwind: bg-white text-[#121212] border-2 border-[#121212] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#121212] hover:bg-[#F5F5F0] active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] active:shadow-none
bg: transparent, text: #121212 border: none, shadow: none hover: bg-[#E8E8E4] Tailwind: bg-transparent text-[#121212] border-none hover:bg-[#E8E8E4]
component.icon-button: Square: w-10 h-10 (sm), w-12 h-12 (md), w-14 h-14 (lg) Same variant styles, icon centered.
component.tag-button: Uses pill shape. Includes dismiss (x) icon. Tailwind: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs inline-flex items-center gap-1

component.name: card
component.base-style: bg: white border: 2px solid #121212 (mobile), 4px (desktop) shadow: 6px 6px 0px 0px #121212 hover: -translate-y-1 Tailwind: bg-white border-2 lg:border-4 border-[#121212] shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#121212] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200

decoration.note: Small geometric shape in top-right corner, 8-12px

component.decoration: Rotate through: circle (yellow), square (red), triangle (blue). Position: absolute, top-3, right-3.

component.name: input
component.base-style: font: Poppins, text-sm sm:text-base bg: white border: 2px solid #121212 padding: px-4 py-3 radius: rounded-none (Bauhaus sharp) Tailwind: font-[Poppins] text-sm sm:text-base bg-white border-2 border-[#121212] px-4 py-3 rounded-none w-full transition-all duration-200
component.label: font: Outfit, text-xs, font-bold, uppercase, tracking-widest color: #121212 margin-bottom: mb-2 Tailwind: font-[Outfit] text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-[#121212] mb-2 block
component.helper-text: font: Poppins, text-xs color: #576974 (default), #D02020 (error), #16A34A (success) margin-top: mt-1.5
component.with-icon: Icon positioned: left or right, 16px from edge. Input padding adjusted: pl-10 (left icon) or pr-10 (right icon).

unchecked.class: w-5 h-5 border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-none bg-white

checked.class: w-5 h-5 border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-none bg-[#FFC400]

component.name: radio

unchecked.class: w-5 h-5 border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-full bg-white

checked.class: w-5 h-5 border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-full bg-white

component.checked: Inner dot: w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#FFC400]

component.name: toggle

off.class: w-11 h-6 border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-full bg-[#E8E8E4]

component.off: Knob: w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-white border border-[#121212] translate-x-0.5

on.class: w-11 h-6 border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-full bg-[#FFC400]

component.on: Knob: w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-white border border-[#121212] translate-x-5

component.name: dropdown
component.trigger: Same as input base style + chevron-down icon right. Tailwind: [input-base] pr-10 cursor-pointer
component.menu: bg: white, border: 2px solid #121212 shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #121212 margin-top: mt-1, max-height: max-h-60, overflow-y: auto Tailwind: bg-white border-2 border-[#121212] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#121212] mt-1
component.item: padding: px-4 py-2.5 hover: bg-[#FFC400]/20 selected: bg-[#FFC400] text-[#121212] font-medium Tailwind: px-4 py-2.5 cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#FFC400]/20

component.name: accordion
component.closed: bg: white, border: 2px lg:border-4 solid #121212 shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #121212 Tailwind: bg-white border-2 lg:border-4 border-[#121212] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#121212]
component.open-content: bg: #FFFBEB (light yellow tint) border-top: 2px solid #121212 Tailwind: bg-[#FFFBEB] border-t-2 border-[#121212] p-5
component.icon: ChevronDown, rotate-180 when open. transition: rotate duration-200

component.name: navbar
component.logo: Three geometric shapes: circle(yellow) + square(black) + triangle(red). InReady text: Outfit, font-black, uppercase. Combined: flex items-center gap-2
component.nav-item: font: Outfit, text-sm, font-bold, uppercase, tracking-wider color: #121212 hover: text-[#FFC400] active: text-[#FFC400] border-b-2 border-[#FFC400]
component.mobile-menu: Hamburger button visible below md breakpoint. Fullscreen overlay: bg-white, items stacked vertically. Close button: X icon, top-right.

component.name: footer
component.accent-bar: Full width bar: h-1 bg-[#FFC400] at top of footer.
component.link-style: color: #E8E8E4, hover: text-[#FFC400] font: Poppins, text-sm
component.copyright: font: Poppins, text-xs, text-[#576974] Below a border-t border-[#576974]/30

component.name: badge
component.base: font: Outfit, text-xs, font-bold, uppercase, tracking-wider padding: px-2.5 py-1 border: 2px solid #121212 radius: rounded-full (pill shape)

component.name: tooltip
component.variant: bg: #121212, text: white padding: px-3 py-2, text-sm border: 2px solid #121212 Arrow: triangle pointing to trigger element
bg: #D02020, text: white Same structure, red background

component.name: pagination
component.item: w-10 h-10, border-2 border-[#121212] font: Outfit, font-bold Tailwind: w-10 h-10 border-2 border-[#121212] flex items-center justify-center font-[Outfit] font-bold text-sm

component.name: tabs
component.tab: font: Outfit, font-bold, uppercase, tracking-wider, text-sm padding: px-4 py-2 border-bottom: 3px solid transparent active: border-[#FFC400] text-[#121212] inactive: text-[#576974] hover:text-[#121212]

component.name: breadcrumbs
component.item: font: Poppins, text-sm color: #576974 separator: ">" character, mx-2

component.name: datepicker
component.trigger: Same as input base + calendar icon right
component.calendar: bg: #121212, text: white border: 4px solid #121212 shadow: 8px 8px 0px 0px #121212 Header: month/year in Outfit, font-bold Days: Poppins, text-sm Today: rounded-full bg-[#1040C0] Selected: rounded-full bg-[#FFC400] text-[#121212] Actions: Cancel (outline), Set Date (primary yellow)

component.name: toast
component.base: border: 2px solid #121212 shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #121212 padding: p-4, flex items-start gap-3

component.name: modal
component.panel: bg: white border: 4px solid #121212 shadow: 8px 8px 0px 0px #121212 max-width: max-w-lg padding: p-6 sm:p-8 Tailwind: bg-white border-4 border-[#121212] shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_#121212] max-w-lg w-full mx-4 p-6 sm:p-8

decorations.principle: Geometric shapes are not ornamental — they are compositional elements. Use them to create visual rhythm, break monotony, and signal the Bauhaus identity. Rotate through the three primaries (yellow/red/blue) and three shapes (circle/square/triangle).
decorations.pattern: Small shape (8-12px) in top-right corner of cards. Cycle through shapes per card index: card[0]: circle, yellow card[1]: square, red card[2]: triangle, blue card[3]: circle, red (continue rotation)
Large geometric shape (200-400px) at 10-20% opacity. Positioned: absolute, overflow-hidden on section. Used for visual texture in color-blocked sections.
Overlapping geometric shapes creating abstract composition. Circle + rotated square + triangle, layered with varying opacity. One shape uses brand yellow, others use complementary primaries.
CSS radial-gradient pattern for subtle background texture. radial-gradient(#121212 1px, transparent 1px) background-size: 20px 20px opacity: 0.05
Three shapes in a row: circle (w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-[#FFC400]) square (w-3 h-3 rounded-none bg-[#121212]) triangle (w-3 h-3, clip-path, bg-[#D02020]) Represents InReady's three konsentrasi.
Every 3rd decorative element rotated 45deg. Inner content counter-rotated (-45deg) to stay readable. Creates visual tension and constructivist asymmetry.

scaling-rules.rule: Headlines: text-4xl → sm:text-6xl → lg:text-[5rem] Body: text-sm → sm:text-base → lg:text-lg
Cards/panels: border-2 → lg:border-4 Section dividers: always border-b-4
Mobile: shadow-[3px_3px_0px_0px_#121212] Desktop: shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#121212] or shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_#121212]
Stats: 1col → sm:2col → lg:4col Features/Cards: 1col → md:2col → lg:3col How-it-works: 1col → sm:2col → md:4col
Below md: hamburger menu Above md: horizontal nav
Hide large background shapes on mobile (hidden sm:block) Reduce geometric decoration sizes on mobile

images.treatment: Default: grayscale(100%) Hover: grayscale(0%) Transition: duration-300 Tailwind: grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-300
Shape: rounded-full Filter: grayscale Border: 2px solid #121212 Tailwind: rounded-full grayscale border-2 border-[#121212]
Shape: alternate rounded-none (square) and rounded-full (circle) Object-fit: cover
images.formats: Serve WebP with JPG fallback. Lazy loading: loading="lazy" Thumbnails: auto-generated on upload. Max width: 1200px for full-width, 600px for cards.

contrast.note: All color combinations must meet WCAG AA (4.5:1 for text)

accessibility.focus-indicators: All interactive elements: ring-2 ring-[#FFC400] ring-offset-2 High visibility against all backgrounds.
accessibility.semantic-html: Use proper heading hierarchy (h1 → h2 → h3). Use nav, main, article, section, footer. All images: alt text required.
